notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Liam Hicks reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Luke Keaschall. Xavier Edwards to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Liam Hicks reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Liam Hicks reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Luke Keaschall. Xavier Edwards to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Connor Norby GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Connor Norby grounds into a double play, third baseman Tristan Gray to second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Kody Clemens. Liam Hicks scores. Otto Lopez to 3rd. Kyle Stowers out at 2nd. Connor Norby out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Connor Norby rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Connor Norby grounds into a double play, third baseman Tristan Gray to second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Kody Clemens. Liam Hicks scores. Otto Lopez to 3rd. Kyle Stowers out at 2nd. Connor Norby out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Josh Bell reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by pitcher Max Meyer. Austin Martin to 3rd. Austin Martin advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by pitcher Max Meyer.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Justin Topa on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
